chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2743 of 2020 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Hearing of case 1. For order on CMA No.12729/2024. 2. For order on CMA No.10727/2024 3. For hearing of main case. 06-05-2025 Petitioner Syeda Maria Raza present in person. Mr. Hassan Qamar, advocate for respondent No.4/K-Electric. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Deputy Attorney General. Learned counsel for the respondent relies upon the order of the Supreme Court dated 17.10.2023 passed in Civil Petition No.2224 of 2020 to insist that the petition is not maintainable. Petitioner appearing in person confines her case to the plea that her application made to NEPRA, available at page 89, may be decided expeditiously. Learned DAG is present and articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that petition may be disposed of in the said terms. By consent, order accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
